summary: First iteration full e2e testing of PsiCare. All 12 backend tests passed (100%) and all critical frontend flows passed (login, dashboard, sidebar nav, calendar month view + new session modal, patients list/search/filter, patient profile tabs, plan tasks creation+toggle, historial notes modal with mood, stats charts, logout). Seed data working (1 psicologa, 7 patients, tasks, multiple sessions).

minor.issue: Any unknown email silently falls back to demo@psicare.com instead of returning 401/404 - acceptable for mock auth but counterintuitive
Uses naive day-arithmetic (timedelta(days=i*30)) to compute months which can produce duplicate/missing months near month boundaries
psicologa_id passed as query param rather than in body - works but unusual REST style

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is a single ~520-line file - acceptable for MVP but should be split into routers (auth, patients, tasks, sessions, dashboard, seed) before adding more features
Mock auth fallback: login with ANY unknown email returns demo psicologa - should at minimum return 401 for non-demo emails to avoid confusion
monthly_stats uses days=i*30 to step months; replace with proper relativedelta or dateutil-based logic to avoid edge cases at month boundaries
No input validation length limits on free-text fields (motivo_consulta, notas_sesion) - could allow very large payloads
No pagination on /api/patients and /api/sessions (to_list 1000/2000) - fine for MVP but document the limit
CORS allow_origins defaults to '*' with allow_credentials=True - browsers will reject; tighten in production
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes - excellent for testability
seed_data_creation: Seed runs automatically on backend startup if no psicologas exist. Creates Dra. Sofía García, 7 patients, ~35 tasks, and sessions (past completadas, today programadas, future programadas).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_psicare_backend.py - run with `pytest backend/tests/test_psicare_backend.py -v`. Login: demo@psicare.com / any password. Seed auto-runs on startup. Calendar in container shows 'mayo de 2026' - server clock is May 2026, not a bug. All data-testid selectors are well-defined in pages/components.
